column2: DI_Card_Inventory_v2.4
Improved Card inventory with a list of all the Deck, Leader, Intrigue and Conflict cards, including all their details.
Feature list:
- A list of all the Cards for your Deck from the Base game, the Ix Expansion and the Promo cards.
- The list includes all the details of the Cards.
- A list of all the Leaders from the Base game and the Ix expansion and all their Details.
- A Power/Strength rating Tier list for all the Leaders for gaining a basic idea of the relative strength of the various Leaders.
- All the Intrigue cards and their details.
- All the Conflict cards and their details.
- XLSX format: This format has all the data, including notes with clarifications and expanded explanations.
Changelog:
DI_Card_Inventory_v1.0
- Original card inventory created by DEY123 at Boardgamegeek.com
- Basic card list with cost, spaces and special effects.
DI_Card_Inventory_v2.0
- Cleaned up the layout.
- Corrected errors.
- Added the Promo Cards.
- Added a PDF format option.
DI_Card_Inventory_v2.1
- Added A list with All the Leaders.
- Added A Strength/Power tier rating for the Leaders.
DI_Card_Inventory_v2.2
- Added a list of the Intrigue cards
- Added a list of the Conflict cards.
DI_Card_Inventory_v2.3
- Added Ix Expansion Card Deck
- Made various corrections and optimizations to the Deck list.
- Added a DOCX format option.
- Improved PDF format option.
DI_Card_Inventory_v2.4
- Made various corrections to the Deck list.
- Removed PDF and DOC formats.
- Adjusted the Leaders Power Tier list and Complexity level
To do list:
- Add Ix expansion Intrigue and Conflict cards
- Add Immortality expansion cards
- Check Official and Unofficial FAQ's for rule clarifications and Add them to the lists.
